board_csa_architect.notes: Forensic RBAC gap is well-defined. Two new tables + RLS policies complete the existing ForensicRBAC service. INSERT-ONLY enforcement on audit trail is correct pattern.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Anti-ACs are strong: no self-assignment, no free-text, no direct app_client access. Classification tiers (0/1/2) align with SOC 2 CC7.2. Immutable audit trail prevents insider tampering.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: Permission bits (VIEW_FORENSIC, OVERRIDE_CENSOR, AUDIT_VECTORS) provide the granularity needed for REQ-L6-34 agent privilege enforcement downstream.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: BUILDABLE — pure SQL + TypeScript, zero cloud deps. Migration-first approach is correct. No VRAM impact.
